acceptanceCriteria: As a guest user, I want to access the Home page and use the available navigation actions, so that I can navigate to login, customer signup, clean survey, and site survey workflows.
The workflow starts by directly navigating to the application Home page at:

The Home page is expected to load in guest state without authentication. The workflow validates guest-state navigation options and transitions from the Home page to downstream pages through UI controls.
User is not authenticated and is operating in guest state.
validationExpectations: As a guest user, I want to access the Home page and use the available navigation actions, so that I can navigate to login, customer signup, clean survey, and site survey workflows.
The workflow starts by directly navigating to the application Home page at:

The Home page is expected to load in guest state without authentication. The workflow validates guest-state navigation options and transitions from the Home page to downstream pages through UI controls.
User is not authenticated and is operating in guest state.

keywordNames: Verify Home Page Loaded In Guest State
Verify All Home Navigation Controls Are Enabled
Wait For Element To Be Ready

keywords: Verify Home Page Loaded In Guest State
Verify All Home Navigation Controls Are Enabled

approvedScenarios.title: Verify Home page loads successfully in guest state using the approved entry URL
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The application loads the Home page successfully at http://localhost/washtabui/home in guest state without requiring authentication and the approved navigation controls are displayed.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify Person/Profile button is visible and enabled on the Home page in guest state
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The Person/Profile button is visible, enabled, and interactive on the Home page while the user remains in guest state.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify Back button is visible and enabled on the Home page in guest state
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The Back button is visible, enabled, and interactive on the Home page while the user remains in guest state.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify Notification button is visible and enabled on the Home page in guest state
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The Notification button is visible, enabled, and interactive on the Home page while the user remains in guest state.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify Home button is visible and enabled on the Home page in guest state
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The Home button is visible, enabled, and interactive on the Home page while the user remains in guest state.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify Customer signup button is visible and enabled on the Home page in guest state
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The Customer signup button is visible, enabled, and interactive on the Home page while the user remains in guest state.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify Clean survey button is visible and enabled on the Home page in guest state
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The Clean survey button is visible, enabled, and interactive on the Home page while the user remains in guest state.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify Site survey button is visible and enabled on the Home page in guest state
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The Site survey button is visible, enabled, and interactive on the Home page while the user remains in guest state.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify navigation to login page from the Person/Profile button
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The application navigates away from the Home page to the login page and the resulting URL equals /washtabui/login?data=undefined.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify navigation to customer-search workflow from the Customer signup button
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The application navigates away from the Home page to a destination URL containing customer-search.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify navigation to vehicle-survey workflow from the Clean survey button
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The application navigates away from the Home page to a destination URL containing vehicle-survey.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify navigation to survey workflow from the Site survey button
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The application navigates away from the Home page to a destination URL containing survey?data.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify Home button interaction does not break guest-state Home page accessibility
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The application remains accessible in guest state and the user stays on or returns to the Home page with the approved navigation controls still visible and enabled.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify Back button interaction does not remove access to the Home page in guest state
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The application does not enter an error state and the user either remains on the Home page or returns to the previous accessible browser location without unauthorized navigation.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify Notification button interaction is accessible from the Home page in guest state
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The Notification button accepts interaction without breaking the Home page session and the application remains responsive in guest state.

validations: The application loads the Home page successfully at http://localhost/washtabui/home in guest state without requiring authentication and the approved navigation controls are displayed.
The Person/Profile button is visible, enabled, and interactive on the Home page while the user remains in guest state.
The Back button is visible, enabled, and interactive on the Home page while the user remains in guest state.
The Notification button is visible, enabled, and interactive on the Home page while the user remains in guest state.
The Home button is visible, enabled, and interactive on the Home page while the user remains in guest state.
The Customer signup button is visible, enabled, and interactive on the Home page while the user remains in guest state.
The Clean survey button is visible, enabled, and interactive on the Home page while the user remains in guest state.
The Site survey button is visible, enabled, and interactive on the Home page while the user remains in guest state.
The application navigates away from the Home page to the login page and the resulting URL equals /washtabui/login?data=undefined.
The application navigates away from the Home page to a destination URL containing customer-search.
The application navigates away from the Home page to a destination URL containing vehicle-survey.
The application navigates away from the Home page to a destination URL containing survey?data.
The application remains accessible in guest state and the user stays on or returns to the Home page with the approved navigation controls still visible and enabled.
The application does not enter an error state and the user either remains on the Home page or returns to the previous accessible browser location without unauthorized navigation.
The Notification button accepts interaction without breaking the Home page session and the application remains responsive in guest state.

wrapperExpectations: Reuse approved shared/common wrapper keywords before low-level SeleniumLibrary actions.
Do not invent suite-level custom keywords; compose from approved upstream resource knowledge.

mustNotInvent: duplicate ownership for controls already owned in approved upstream resources
hardcoded workflow routing or mapped page logic in Python
downstreamGuidance.generationRule: Downstream generation must consume approved workflow knowledge plus approved resource context before creating new artifacts.

unresolvedGaps: Element name is technical and derived from DOM id instead of business intent.
Element name exposes implementation details instead of user-facing intent.
Element name is DOM-centric and not business-readable.
Element name is technical and redundant.
Element name is difficult to read and tightly coupled to implementation naming.
Element name is implementation-centric rather than workflow-centric.
Element name is implementation-centric rather than business-readable.
Locator xpath=//a is overly generic and likely to match multiple links, creating unstable automation behavior.
This link appears to be the internal anchor rendered inside the Home button shadow DOM and duplicates the Home button control already captured.
Background content container is layout-only and does not provide meaningful workflow interaction or validation value.
No explicit page-state indicator or guest-state identifier element is captured beyond navigation controls and URL validation.
